name: Herb Chodecz
description: Coat of arms of Chodecz (Herb Chodecz), a city in Poland.
svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 750 875"><title>Herb Chodecz</title><g style="fill:#ff0101;fill-opacity:1"><path d="M746.249 493.108c-.002 208.016-166.211 376.651-371.26 376.651S3.75 701.124 3.75 493.108V5.241h742.5z" style="fill:#ff0101;fill-opacity:1;stroke:#000;stroke-width:7.48720074;stroke-miterlimit:4;stroke-dasharray:none;stroke-opacity:1" transform="matrix(1 0 0 1.00342 -.001 -1.496)"/></g><path d="M45.194 224.911h216.549v40.127H45.194zM91.75 44.5 35.969 91.313l22.25 26.5L87.5 93.25l110.469 131.656h45.156z" style="opacity:.98999999;fill:#fdfdfd;fill-opacity:1;stroke:#000;stroke-width:1.44373441;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-miterlimit:4;stroke-dasharray:none;stroke-opacity:1" transform="matrix(-2.59743 0 0 2.59743 773.625 -34.502)"/><path d="M215.188 44.5 63.813 224.906h45.156l110.5-131.656 29.281 24.563 22.219-26.5z" style="opacity:.98999999;fill:#fdfdfd;fill-opacity:1;stroke:#000;stroke-width:1.44373441;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;stroke-miterlimit:4;stroke-dasharray:none;stroke-opacity:1" transform="matrix(-2.59743 0 0 2.59743 773.625 -34.502)"/></svg>
